key_assumptions.source: Sum of parts / catalyst path in IRR steps
Model choice in valuation.json (not company guidance)

open_questions: Pull SEDAR/TSXV H1 2025, YE 2025, and latest interim into `GDRZF/investor-documents/` and replace secondary cash/share figures.
Confirm Final Priority Order: Gold Reserve attached claim amount and rank.
Track Amber closing / OFAC / appeals after the 29 Nov 2025 Sale Order.
Revisit stance if verified net recovery path supports ≥15% per year with bounded bear.
thesis: Gold Reserve Ltd. is a Bermuda company (continued from Alberta in September 2024) that no longer operates a mine. **[Fact]** Its economic identity is a **judgment-and-claim vehicle**: collect unpaid amounts under a 2014 ICSID award and 2016 Venezuela settlement, participate as a creditor/bidder in the Delaware forced sale of PDV Holding (CITGO’s parent stack), and prosecute a 2025 arbitration over revoked Siembra Minera mining rights. **[Fact]** Shares trade as **GDRZF** (OTCQX) and **GRZ.V** (TSXV). **[Fact]** The company deregistered from the SEC on 30 January 2025, so U.S. EDGAR is no longer the primary reporting channel. **[Fact]**
why_market_wrong: The quote may treat GDRZF as a thin OTC mining stub and miss a **dated legal-process payoff** with a soft cash floor. **[Inference]** Predictive attribute: **complexity discount** (multi-jurisdiction enforcement, OFAC, creditor waterfalls, CVR/bonus leakage). **[Inference]** Catalyst path: Amber Energy SPA sale order entered 29 November 2025; closing still needs licenses and surviving appeals. **[Inference]**
